verses.text: Topa in Moses kiangah, “Thei in, Faro' tungah Pasian bangin nang kong bawl hi. Na sanggampa Aaron pen na kamsangpa hi ding hi
Nang kong thupiak khempeuh na gen ding hi. Ama leitang panin Israel mite a paikhiat sakna dingin Faro' tungah na sanggampa Aaron in gen ding hi
Ahih hangin keimah in Faro' lungsim ka khauhsak ding a, Egypt gamah ka limte leh ka na lamdangte tampi ka bawl khit hangin
Faro in nang' thu hong ngailo ding hi. Tua ciangin keimah in Egypt tungah gimna ka tungsak ding a, thukhen nasepna lianpite tawh Egypt gam panin Israel mi ahi ka mihonte ka paikhiatpih ding hi
Keimah in Egypt tungah gimna tung sakin amaute' lak panin Israel mite ka paikhiatpih ciangin Egypt mite in Topa ka hihna hong thei ding uh hi,” a ci hi
Moses leh Aaron zong Topa' sawl bangmahin gamta uh a, Topa in amaute a thupiak bangin amaute in sem uh hi
Tu-in amaute in Faro' tungah thu a gen laitakun Moses kum sawmgiat pha a, Aaron kum sawmgiatlethum a pha hi.
Topa in Moses leh Aaron' kiangah

“Faro in note kiangah, ‘Note a thutak na hihna uh na lamdang khat tawh hong lak un,’ hong cih ciangin nangmah in Aaron kiangah, ‘Gulpi khat a suah theihna dingin na ciangkhut la in la, Faro' mai-ah khia suk in,’ ci in,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Faro' kiangah Moses leh Aaron pai-in Topa' thupiak bangin gamta uh hi. Aaron in Faro leh a uliante' mai-ah a ciangkhut lawn suk a, gulpi khat a suak hi
Tua ciangin Faro in a mipilte leh a aisan siamte a sam hi. Egypt mitphial siamte in zong amau' siamna tawh tua bang teek mahin a bawl thei uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh a milip in a ciangkhut uh khia suk ciat uh a, tuate gulpi vive a suak hi. Ahih hangin Aaron' ciangkhut in amau' ciangkhutte a valhtum hi
Topa' gensa bangin Faro' lungsim khauh lai a, amah in amaute' thu ngailo hi.
Tua ciangin Topa in Moses kiangah, “Faro' lungsim khauh mahmah a, amah in mite paisak nuamlo hi
Tua ahih manin zingsangin Nail gunah a pai ciangin amah tawh a kimu dingin nang zong pai in. Gulpi a suak na ciangkhut pen mah tawi in la, gun gei-ah amah ngak in

Amah tawh na kimuh ciangin ama kiangah, ‘Sehnel gam sungah ama mite in amah a biak theihna dingin a mite na paisakna ding a gen dingin Hebru-te' Pasian, Topa in nang' kiangah kei hong sawl khin hi. Ahi zongin tu ciangdong ama thu na mang kei hi
Tua ahih manin Topa in, “Keima sep ding thute a muh ciangin kei kua ka hi hiam cih hong thei ding hi,” ci hi. En in, hih ka ciangkhut tawh gun tui ka sat ding a, tuite, sisan hong suak ding hi
Ngasate si ding a, gun tui uihgawp ding ahih manin Egypt mite in dawn theilo ding uh hi,’ ci in,” a ci hi

Topa in Moses kiangah, “Aaron kiangah hih bangin gen in: ‘Na ciangkhut la in la, sisan a suah theihna dingin Egypt tuite, amau' gunte, amau' luite, amau' bualte' tung leh amau' tuili khempeuhte' tungah na khut zan in. Egypt gam sunga sing beel leh suang beel khempeuh sung nangawnah sisan om ding hi,’ ci in,” a ci hi
Moses leh Aaron in Topa' thupiak bangin hih uh hi. Faro leh ama uliante' muhin amah in ciangkhut vik to-in Nail gun sunga om tui sat a, Nail gun sunga om tui khempeuh sisan a suak hi
Nail gun sunga ngasate si hi. Nail gun uih a, Egypt mite in Nail gun pan-a tui dawn theilo uh hi. Egypt gamsung khempeuhah sisan om hi
Ahih hangin Egypt mitphial siamte in amau' siamna tawh tua bangmah bawl thei uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin Faro' lungsim a khauh ngei mahin khauh a, Topa' gensa bangin amah in amaute' thu ngailo hi
Faro kihei-in a inn sungah pai a, amah in a lungsim nangawnah tua thu ngaihsutin nei nawnlo hi
Amaute in Nail gun tui dawn theilo uh ahih manin Egypt mite khempeuh in Nail gun kiim tengah tui dawn ding a to uh hi
Topa in gun a sat zawh ni sagih pha ta hi.
